chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1501 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag „A‟ 2. For hearing of CMA No.2709/2024 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 16-10-2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the Petitioners nor any intimation is received. On 20-03-2025 the following order was passed;- “None present for the petitioner; no intimation is received. This petition is liable to be dismissed for non-prosecution; however, in the interest of justice, matter is adjourned to 22-04-2025, for which intimation notice be sent to counsel for petitioner.” Thereafter no such concrete efforts were made either by the Petitioners or their Counsel to get the matter fixed in Court, except on 20-04-2025 when Counsel moved an application for urgent hearing, but did not pursue the same and it was dismissed. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioners and their Counsel prima facie suggests that either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
